97e6e576f359.title: Publish opening hours — you're invisible to 'open now' searches
97e6e576f359.description: No opening hours listed. Every customer filtering by 'open now' on Google Maps will never see you. This takes 2 minutes to fix.
97e6e576f359.management_implication: This is a zero-effort, high-impact fix.

f384d9d7ff83.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
f384d9d7ff83.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
f384d9d7ff83.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

1fbefafe00e0.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
1fbefafe00e0.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

5394a02e0b35.title: Protect the 4.5/5 rating — it took years to build
5394a02e0b35.description: With 489 reviews at 4.5/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
